items.name: SmartQueue
items.description: SmartQueue is an AI-powered smart queue management system designed to reduce waiting time and improve customer experience. It allows users to book appointments, generate QR-based tokens, track live queue status, and receive real-time updates. The system also provides admin dashboards and AI-based crowd prediction for efficient queue handling.
